top_signals.title: Fuel Markets in US and Europe Are Flashing Record Tightness
top_signals.summary: Fuel markets in the US and Europe are flashing record tightness as tensions flare up in the Middle East, threatening more pain for consumers already strained with high prices at the pump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Jumps as Trump Vows to Renew Iran Blockade, Nasdaq Slumps | Markets P.M. for July 13 - WSJ

top_signals.title: Why Stellar Bank Earnings Aren't Enough
top_signals.summary: Baird Senior Research Analyst David George joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why stellar bank earnings aren't translating into stock gains. He says investors are facing a "buy the rumor, sell the news" moment as expectations reached extreme levels, while emphasizing that banks are far safer than before the financial crisis and that the US consumer remains resilient despite broader economic concerns. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Chamath Palihapitiya says soaring AI token spend will hit companies' earnings
top_signals.summary: Palihapitiya is part of a growing chorus of investors and tech executives who are cautioning that the tokenmaxxing era is coming to an end.
